step_rationale: Dysregulated in early-stage MI; ischemia-reperfusion marker.
mechanism: miR-208b dysregulation marks myocardial ischemic injury and ischemia-reperfusion stress in acute MI.

references.title: An exploration into the diagnostic capabilities of microRNAs for myocardial infarction using machine learning.
Human Heart Anoxia and Reperfusion Tissue (HEART) Model for the Rapid Study of Exosome Bound miRNA Expression As Biomarkers for Myocardial Infarction.
